feed.title: cpprefjp - C++日本語リファレンス

entry.title: find -- fixing wrong function declaration
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/find.md b/reference/algorithm/find.md
index 7cab0e39a..e32bfe88c 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/find.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/find.md
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ namespace std {
          const T& value);   // (2) C++17
   template<class ExecutionPolicy,
            class ForwardIterator,
-           class T = typename iterator_traits<InputIterator>::value_type>
+           class T = typename iterator_traits<ForwardIterator>::value_type>
   ForwardIterator
     find(ExecutionPolicy&& exec,
          ForwardIterator first,

entry.title: operator<=> -- fixing typo
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_compare_3way.md b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_compare_3way.md
index 946965be4..9c9a91dfa 100644
--- a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_compare_3way.md
+++ b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_compare_3way.md
@@ -21,7 +21,7 @@ namespace std::chrono {
 
 ## 戻り値
 ```cpp
-return lhs.time_since_epoch() <=> rhs.time_since_poch();
+return lhs.time_since_epoch() <=> rhs.time_since_epoch();
 ```
 * time_since_epoch[link /reference/chrono/time_point/time_since_epoch.md]

entry.title: operator== -- fixing typo
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_equal.md b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_equal.md
index 38d9c71fa..2802d995f 100644
--- a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_equal.md
+++ b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_equal.md
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ namespace chrono {
 
 ## 戻り値
 ```cpp
-return lhs.time_since_epoch() == rhs.time_since_poch();
+return lhs.time_since_epoch() == rhs.time_since_epoch();
 ```
 * time_since_epoch[link /reference/chrono/time_point/time_since_epoch.md]

entry.title: operator> -- fixing typo
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater.md b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater.md
index 9ae32fd94..7752b155d 100644
--- a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater.md
+++ b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater.md
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ namespace chrono {
 
 ## 戻り値
 ```cpp
-return lhs.time_since_epoch() > rhs.time_since_poch();
+return lhs.time_since_epoch() > rhs.time_since_epoch();
 ```
 * time_since_epoch[link /reference/chrono/time_point/time_since_epoch.md]

entry.title: operator>= -- fixing typo
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater_equal.md b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater_equal.md
index ba6fcf1eb..38f481b81 100644
--- a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater_equal.md
+++ b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_greater_equal.md
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ namespace chrono {
 
 ## 戻り値
 ```cpp
-return lhs.time_since_epoch() >= rhs.time_since_poch();
+return lhs.time_since_epoch() >= rhs.time_since_epoch();
 ```
 * time_since_epoch[link /reference/chrono/time_point/time_since_epoch.md]

entry.title: operator< -- fixing typo
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less.md b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less.md
index 7e7233582..3ee8d803b 100644
--- a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less.md
+++ b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less.md
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ namespace chrono {
 
 ## 戻り値
 ```cpp
-return lhs.time_since_epoch() < rhs.time_since_poch();
+return lhs.time_since_epoch() < rhs.time_since_epoch();
 ```
 * time_since_epoch[link /reference/chrono/time_point/time_since_epoch.md]

entry.title: operator<= -- fixing typo
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less_equal.md b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less_equal.md
index 85196fe07..7dfad05a0 100644
--- a/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less_equal.md
+++ b/reference/chrono/time_point/op_less_equal.md
@@ -24,7 +24,7 @@ namespace chrono {
 
 ## 戻り値
 ```cpp
-return lhs.time_since_epoch() <= rhs.time_since_poch();
+return lhs.time_since_epoch() <= rhs.time_since_epoch();
 ```
 * time_since_epoch[link /reference/chrono/time_point/time_since_epoch.md]

entry.title: make_heap -- fix missing type declaration
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/make_heap.md b/reference/algorithm/make_heap.md
index 5779fabe1..a2584ff14 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/make_heap.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/make_heap.md
@@ -85,7 +85,7 @@ void make_heap(RandomAccessIterator first, RandomAccessIterator last)
   for (difference_type top = len / 2 - 1; top >= 0; --top) {
     value_type v = std::move(first[top]);
     difference_type p = top;
-    for (c = p * 2 + 1; c < len; c = p * 2 + 1) {
+    for (difference_type c = p * 2 + 1; c < len; c = p * 2 + 1) {
       if (c + 1 < len && first[c] < first[c + 1])
         ++c;
       if (!bool(v < first[c]))

entry.title: is_sorted_until -- fixing issue in example implementation code
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/algorithm/is_sorted_until.md b/reference/algorithm/is_sorted_until.md
index 7965bb8b7..548096dcd 100644
--- a/reference/algorithm/is_sorted_until.md
+++ b/reference/algorithm/is_sorted_until.md
@@ -92,7 +92,7 @@ ForwardIterator is_sorted_until(ForwardIterator first, ForwardIterator last)
   auto it = first;
   if (it == last || ++it == last)
     return last;
-  while (it != last && *first < *it)
+  while (it != last && *first <= *it)
     ++first, ++it;
   return it;
 }

entry.title: swap -- fixing to match C++11 standards
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap.md b/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap.md
index bf78cf50d..1b35280d7 100644
--- a/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap.md
+++ b/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap.md
@@ -36,14 +36,14 @@ int main()
   std::unique_ptr<int> a(new int(3));
   std::unique_ptr<int> b(new int(1));
 
-  std::cout << a << std::endl;
-  std::cout << b << std::endl;
+  std::cout << a.get() << std::endl;
+  std::cout << b.get() << std::endl;
 
   // aとbを入れ替える
   a.swap(b);
 
-  std::cout << a << std::endl;
-  std::cout << b << std::endl;
+  std::cout << a.get() << std::endl;
+  std::cout << b.get() << std::endl;
 }
 ```
 * swap[color ff0000]

entry.title: swap (非メンバ関数) -- fixing to match C++11 standards
entry.summary:
diff --git a/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap_free.md b/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap_free.md
index 2bb60fa52..f6254dede 100644
--- a/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap_free.md
+++ b/reference/memory/unique_ptr/swap_free.md
@@ -36,14 +36,14 @@ int main()
   std::unique_ptr<int> a(new int(3));
   std::unique_ptr<int> b(new int(1));
 
-  std::cout << a << std::endl;
-  std::cout << b << std::endl;
+  std::cout << a.get() << std::endl;
+  std::cout << b.get() << std::endl;
 
   // aとbを入れ替える
   std::swap(a, b);
 
-  std::cout << a << std::endl;
-  std::cout << b << std::endl;
+  std::cout << a.get() << std::endl;
+  std::cout << b.get() << std::endl;
 }
 ```
 * std::swap[color ff0000]
